name: Dark Romance
description: Deep crimson and black roses intertwined with velvety foliage for a love that defies convention.

name: Midnight Garden
description: Lunar blooms in indigo and silver — an enchanted nocturne captured in petals.

name: Shadow Bloom
description: Dramatic silhouettes of sculptural flora for the modern minimalist aesthetic.

name: Velvet Noir
description: Plush dark petals in monochrome, accented with touches of charcoal and smoke.

name: Gothic Elegance
description: Victorian-inspired arrangements of dark florals, dried botanicals, and antique textures.

name: Black Orchid
description: Rare and exotic — a collection built around the enigmatic black orchid and tropical rarities.
